posts.content: Exploring new UX patterns today! The intersection of design systems and accessibility is where the real magic happens. What tools are you all using? 🎨
Just shipped a major update to our design system. New component library has 50+ components with full dark mode support! 🚀
Started learning TypeScript this week. Already can't imagine going back to plain JavaScript. The type safety alone is worth it!
Just published my new article on building responsive layouts with CSS Grid. Check it out! The key insight: stop thinking in pixels, start thinking in content. 📝
